The Climb · Zodi Karma

Zodi Karma is the merit your animal gathers: the daily visit, the proverbs studied, the moons checked, the matches tested. It buys nothing. It only lifts you, station by station, from Wanderer to Blessed.

  • ✦Blessed by the Gods of Zodi100,000
  • ◉Awakened10,000
  • ·Wanderer0

Six stations in all — the full ladder lives on the Karmic Board.

蝶 Glasswing Butterfly

0 of 13 chapters read

♋ Cancer and 羊 Year of the Goat

Glasswing Butterfly

You let the world look straight through you, even when what's underneath was never safe to swallow.

Zodi Animal · No. 044 / 144

In brief

Your Primal Zodiac Animal is the Glasswing Butterfly, Cancer's need to feel safe before it is seen crossed with the Goat's gift for staying gentle until gentleness stops working.

  • Cancer

    Gives you the instinct to feel safe before you let yourself be seen.

  • The Goat

    Gives you a gentleness that only hardens once peace has actually failed.

  • The Glasswing Butterfly

    Fuses both into one instinct: stay soft and visible on the surface, and keep the real defense somewhere no one can reach it first.

One strength, one cost: you are nearly impossible to threaten on purpose, and just as hard to actually reach. This reading traces where that instinct comes from, and what it becomes when it grows up.

Meet the Glasswing Butterfly

Soft to look at. Expensive to test.

In the shaded understory of Central American rainforest, from Mexico down through Panama, Greta oto holds so still in a shaft of broken light that a bird looks past its glass-clear wings twice.

Everything this reading claims about you is grounded in what the Glasswing Butterfly actually is: a chemically armed insect wearing the appearance of having nothing to hide. This chapter is that foundation. The rest of the page draws its meaning from these six traits, and only these.

The wings were never the disguise. The blood was.

6 traits below

01of six

Glass in the wings

Animal fact

The clear zones of the wing are bare membrane covered in irregular nanopillars 150 to 250 nanometres tall that scatter almost no reflected light from any viewing angle.

Our reading

You don't perform openness. Whatever gets through you gets through because there was truly nothing in the way, not because you arranged it to look that way.

02of six

Invisible, and still poisonous

Animal fact

Despite carrying toxins that make it unpalatable, the Glasswing is attacked less often than opaque, equally toxic relatives. Transparency itself measurably lowers detection by predators.

Our reading

Being hard to threaten and being easy to miss are usually two different problems. In you, one solves the other: the less you're seen coming, the less anyone tries anything at all.

03of six

The one plant it needs

Animal fact

The caterpillar feeds almost exclusively on Cestrum, a toxic nightshade genus; larvae switched to other host plants frequently die in the first instar or develop poorly.

Our reading

The thing you actually need is specific and non-negotiable, even when substitutes are offered generously. Close is not the same plant.

04of six

A silk anchor before the risk

Animal fact

Before pupating, the caterpillar spins a silk pad on the underside of a leaf and hooks into it with a bristled structure called a cremaster, an attachment strong enough to survive wind and a predator's pull, without breaking.

Our reading

You do not enter a real transformation without first securing something to hold you there. The anchor gets built before the risk, never during it.

05of six

A courtship you can't rush

Animal fact

Males gather in shaded leks and convert plant-derived pyrrolizidine alkaloids into a courtship pheromone through a multi-step chemical process; females choose based on the display, not a chase.

Our reading

What you offer has to be manufactured, not improvised, and it only works on someone willing to stand still long enough to notice it. You were never built for pursuit.

06of six

Fragile-looking, built for distance

Animal fact

The adult can fly up to twelve miles in a single day while migrating between elevations, and despite its papery look, can carry roughly forty times its own body weight.

Our reading

The parts of you that look like they'd break under pressure are, on inspection, exactly the parts built to carry the most. Delicate was never the same as weak.

The Glasswing Butterfly dossier

The Dossier

Zodi Animal
No. 044 / 144

☼ Glasswing Butterfly · Cancer × Goat

The Unseen Guardian

Reads a room instantly, gives without keeping score, and guards one door nobody else holds a key to.

Profile

Archetype
The Unseen Guardian
Central gift
Senses danger before it arrives
Central shadow
Becomes impossible to reach
Protective instinct
Goes still, not loud
Growth lesson
Let the guard be seen
Power phase
New Moon
Element
Earth
Ideal habitat
Shade, soft light, one hidden exit

See whether these five traits actually describe you, not just the animal.

Take the personality test

Tap a trait to see it in yourself

    Glasswing ButterflyPick a trait above to see how strongly it tends to show up in you, and which way it leans.

    Two zodiacs, one animal

    Where Cancer and the Goat meet

    Cancer brings

    • A memory for who felt safe and who didn't, held long after the moment passes.
    • A shell that goes up before any decision gets made about who's actually a threat.
    • Devotion that runs quiet and deep, aimed at very few people at a time.

    The Goat brings

    • A gentleness that would rather absorb friction than start it.
    • A need for a settled, protected space before anything else can happen.
    • Stubbornness that only shows up once patience has already been spent.

    What the crossing makes

    Fused well, Cancer's watchfulness and the Goat's gentleness make an animal that can afford to be soft, because its actual defenses sit somewhere no one thought to look. It gives generously, reads a room before entering it, and never confuses being liked with being safe.

    Where they pull against each other

    Cancer wants to keep circling back to check the water; the Goat wants to have already decided it's calm and stop discussing it. Pulled apart, you either recheck a safety that was never actually in question, or declare peace over a problem that hasn't been solved. The whole reading is about telling those two apart.

    Drag the dial to weigh your two halves and watch the blend change

    Cancer
    Goat
    50 Cancer In balance Goat 50

    In balance: you feel a room accurately, then choose softness on purpose, not by default.

    Your element

    土

    Your element is Earth

    Earth's archetype: The Nurturer · in the Glasswing Butterfly: The Patient Vault

    Earth's archetype in this system is the Nurturer. In the Glasswing Butterfly it settles into something more specific: a Nurturer that gives generously on the surface and banks its real reserves somewhere only it can access. At its best, Earth is what holds and feeds everything nearby without asking to be thanked for it. In excess, that same Earth stops giving and starts hoarding. Nourishment turns into a reserve nobody else is allowed to draw from. The Shadow chapter wears this exact signature: known by everyone, reached by almost no one.

    How this was calculated

    Every Zodi Animal takes its element from the fixed element of its Chinese year-animal: for the Goat, that is Earth. Your Western sign adds a second note: Cancer carries Water. In the five-phase cycle, Earth restrains Water: it banks a river, holds a shoreline, and reads here as a grounded, steady nature keeping an otherwise restless, feeling-led current from overflowing its edges. The pairing of animal and element archetype is Zodi Animal's own reading of these traditional systems, offered for reflection.

    DirectionCenter
    SeasonLate summer / between seasons
    VirtueFidelity
    ColorYellow

    The elements around you

    Wu Xing 五行, the Five Phases, is a system of relationships, not isolated traits. Here is how the other four move around yours.

    Generates you

    火Fire feeds Earth the way warmth feeds ground

    In the five-phase cycle, Fire's ash becomes the Earth it burns down into: Fire generates Earth. For an animal built on quiet reserves, a little warmth and attention from outside is what keeps the ground from going cold and depleted.

    Balances you

    木Wood roots into Earth and keeps it from spreading too thin

    Wood draws directly from Earth, the way roots pull nutrients from soil, and in the cycle's other direction, checks it. A friend or partner with Wood's directness is what keeps this animal's generosity from turning formless: a boundary, not a drain.

    You generate

    金Earth compresses into Metal the way pressure makes ore

    Earth generates Metal in the cycle, the way deep pressure over time forms ore inside rock. What this animal holds quietly, and for long enough, eventually becomes something harder and more useful: clarity, a decision, a boundary, but only on its own schedule.

    You restrain

    水Earth banks Water the way a shoreline holds a river

    Earth restrains Water in the cycle, the way a bank holds a river to its course. Around someone whose feeling runs fast and full, like Cancer's Water, this animal provides the steady edge: not a dam, a shoreline, letting the current keep moving without letting it flood.

    Go deeper: Bazi 八字

    This is Wu Xing 五行, and it runs deeper

    This element comes from one crossing, the Goat, and is only a starting note: the Chinese calendar's Four Pillars reads your exact birth hour, day, month, and year for a fuller elemental profile, not just the one animal year gives you.

    Where this page gives you Earth in outline, a Bazi chart gives you Earth in detail: which pillar carries it, what it's paired with, and where the other four phases sit around it in your specific chart.

    BaziRead your Four Pillars ElementsSee all five phases

    Go deeper: Chakras

    Earth in the body

    Held beside the yogic map, Earth finds its closest match in the Root chakra, Muladhara. It governs the sense of a safe, stable base to stand on, the exact ground this animal is always quietly checking for before it lets its guard down. Its bija sound is LAM; its element there is earth.

    Treat the pairing as an interpretive bridge between two traditions, not an equivalence.

    Root chakraMuladharaBija: LAMElement: earth
    ChakraVisit your Root chakra PracticeYoga for your element

    Take it further

    土ElementThe Earth element in full OverviewAll five elements Bazi · 八字Your Four Pillars Feng shuiSet up your workspace

    The Primal Mirror

    Every reading passes five gates, in order

    One mechanism, five states. Reflex, capacity, defense, distortion, integration.

    Swipe the gates · tap to open each one

    01 · Reflex

    Instinct: stillness first, always

    Before you decide anything, you go still and let the moment look straight through you.

    Threatened, most animals pick fight or flight. Yours picks neither. The first move is to go quiet, hold your shape, and let whatever's approaching look straight through you without finding a reason to stop.

    It reads as passivity from the outside. It isn't. It's a read on the room happening underneath a surface that gives nothing away, the same way a wing built to be seen through gives nothing away either.

    02 · Capacity

    Gift: safety that doesn't announce itself

    The same stillness that hides you turns out to be the reason people relax around you.

    The reflex that goes quiet under threat becomes, in daily life, an unusual kind of safety: you don't perform harmlessness, you simply don't read as a threat to anyone paying attention, which frees a room to be more honest than it would be around someone working harder to be liked.

    People tell you things they haven't told anyone else. Not because you asked. Because nothing about you set off the part of them that keeps score.

    03 · Defense

    Guard: protecting the right to choose when

    What you're protecting is the choice of exactly when to be truly seen, not whether.

    What the gift protects is authorship over your own reveal. You'll be looked at constantly and let very little of that count as actually being known, because being known on someone else's schedule feels like the one risk worth avoiding.

    The guard doesn't look like a guard. That's the design. Nothing about the surface should tip anyone off that a decision is even being made underneath it.

    04 · Distortion

    Shadow: seen constantly, known rarely

    Everyone thinks they know you, and almost no one has actually touched anything.

    What trips it. Someone asks to be let in faster than your own timeline allows, or asks at all instead of waiting to be shown.

    What your mind says. “If they really understood, they wouldn't need to ask.”

    What you do. You go stiller. You answer the surface question, withhold the real one, and let the conversation end feeling complete when it wasn't.

    What it costs. The people closest to you start describing you the same way strangers do, and you end up fluent in a version of yourself <b>built entirely out of what you were willing to let show through the glass</b>.

    In love

    A partner who can list your habits perfectly and still can't say what actually scares you.

    At work

    Colleagues who trust your judgment completely and have never once seen you unsure.

    With friends

    Old friends who'll tell you anything, and notice much later that you've never once done the same.

    05 · Integration

    Awakened: the same strength, integrated

    You still go still. You have simply stopped mistaking stillness for the only door you're allowed to open.

    The awakened Glasswing still goes quiet first, still lets people look straight through the surface before anything gets decided. What changes is that stillness stops being the whole answer: sometimes, on purpose, you let something real show through with it, on a schedule you chose instead of one you were protecting.

    You are seen through as often as ever. The difference is that, sometimes, there is something there on purpose, and you get to watch someone find it.

    Name the form you are becoming

    Complete the sentence: I go still, and then I

    Beyond the reading · ✦ Purple Star

    Meet the awakened Glasswing Butterfly

    The Mirror showed you the awakened form in outline. Purple Star astrology, Zi Wei Dou Shu (紫微斗数), is the oldest and most detailed of the Chinese chart systems. It sets fourteen major stars across the twelve palaces of a life, and read for the Cancer Goat crossing it keeps landing on the same two.

    What Purple Star already suspects about you

    天相Tiān Xiàng the Minister star

    For a Cancer born in the Goat year, the Minister star tends to sit steady and quietly protective in the chart. It rules the ones who guard a room from the side of it, never the center, offering support that keeps no ledger of what it's owed. You read what a space actually needs before anyone asks, and you supply it without ever making yourself the story.

    武曲Wǔ Qǔ the Wealth star

    Near the Life palace, 命宮, Purple Star tends to place the wealth star for this crossing, the one that banks its real resources somewhere quiet and only spends them when spending actually counts. You have felt this your whole life: soft on the surface, and carrying a reserve underneath that almost nobody gets to see used. It is the Glasswing written as a star, the needle kept in silk until the moment finally calls for it.

    That is the outline the Cancer Goat tends to share. Your exact birth hour is what moves these stars into your own twelve palaces and shows which one runs loudest: the money, the love, the work, or the quiet.

    Cast your Purple Star chart and see how close it lands What is Zi Wei Dou Shu

    A generalized reading for the Cancer Goat crossing, offered for reflection. Your exact birth date and hour set the real chart.

    Keep reading it, in your dashboard

    A free account saves your chart and brings a new reading for your animal each week.

    紫微

    Your full Purple Star chart

    All fourteen stars across your twelve palaces, cast for your Cancer Goat crossing and saved to your dashboard.

     ☼

    The awakened Glasswing Butterfly, tracked

    Your path from the fallen form to the awakened one, followed over time, with a fresh reading for your animal every week.
    縁

    The karmic fortune of five

    Invite five friends to find their Zodi Animal, and your Zodi Karma opens the Circle reading: how the six of you move together.

    Create your free account

    Free. No card. Your chart, your weekly reading, and your invited circle, kept in one place.

    Career and working life

    Your working nature

    An application of the archetype, not a verdict: you are likely to work best when the room is calm enough that your read on it can be trusted, and no one is asking you to prove your usefulness out loud.

    01 / 05

    Leads by making the room safe to think in

    You lead by lowering the temperature, not raising your voice. People bring you their real numbers because nothing about the room punishes an honest one.

    The cost is that your own read stays private even when it's the most useful thing in the meeting. Say the quiet part on purpose, on schedule, not only when asked directly.

    02 / 05

    Needs quiet before it needs speed

    You do the best work with a predictable rhythm, one clear owner per decision, and enough notice to feel out a room before you're asked to perform in it.

    What drains you fastest is being read in real time: forced transparency, public workshopping, decisions made out loud before you've had a private pass at them.

    • Predictable rhythm
    • Advance notice
    • One clear decision-maker
    • Private thinking time

    03 / 05

    Decides slowly, delegates the visible part first

    Your decision pattern is to gather quietly, decide privately, and announce late. It is more accurate than fast decisions are, but it costs you the room's trust in your process if it happens too often. Say roughly when a decision is coming, even before it's ready.

    You delegate the parts of a project that show, and keep the risk assessment for yourself. Reverse it occasionally: let someone else carry the part that could actually go wrong.

    04 / 05

    Stalls when the guard has no clear reason to lower

    The loud failure is going quiet in exactly the meeting that needed your read out loud, and letting a worse decision stand because you didn't correct it in the room.

    The quiet one is burnout that looks like competence right up until it doesn't: you keep absorbing friction on everyone's behalf until the absorbing itself becomes the job, and there's no version of you left that isn't managing something.

    05 / 05

    Compounds through trust, not visibility

    What compounds is a reputation for being right quietly, over years, in a way that outlasts anyone who was louder about it. Trust like that is slow, and very hard to unseat once it's built.

    One small practice: once a week, say the read out loud before you're asked for it. Let being right happen in public sometimes, on purpose.

    Your Ideal Habitat

    Living with your Zodi Animal

    Shaded, soft-lit, and never fully exposed.

    In the wild, the Glasswing keeps to the dim, moist understory of the rainforest, roosts communally at the same site night after night, and stays close to the one host plant its whole next generation depends on. Translated into a room: shade over glare, a fixed and familiar base, and proximity to the one relationship or project that actually needs tending. The rest can be moved around it.

    Your feng shui palette

    Feng shui builds a room from your element and the one that feeds it. Earth is yours; Fire is what feeds it. Ground the room the way the wing holds its color: mostly clear, warmed only at the edges.

    Most of the roomA small accent

    GroundEarthAbout 45% of the room

    Raw Umber

    A steady, unlit brown, the color of the shaded forest floor the Glasswing never strays far from.

    SupportEarthAbout 29% of the room

    Parchment Glass

    A pale, faintly warm neutral that echoes the near-transparency of the wing itself without going cold or clinical.

    AccentFireAbout 17% of the room

    Wing-Border Amber

    The warm orange-brown that rings the clear part of the wing; Fire feeding Earth, in exactly the proportion the animal wears it.

    SparkFireAbout 9% of the room

    Ember Red

    A single warm accent used sparingly, the way the Glasswing's own red-orange tint shows up only at the very edge.

    Arrange your whole space with feng shui

    Workspace

    Needs a door that closes and a window with filtered, not direct, light. Glare reads as exposure here, and exposure is expensive.

    Bedroom

    Should be the most shaded, least visible room in the home; this is the one space allowed to be fully opaque.

    Entry

    Wants a soft threshold: a bench, a low light, something that slows the transition from outside noise to inside stillness.

    Living area

    Works best with one clear sightline to the door and seating that doesn't force face-to-face proximity on arrival.

    The one plant

    Keep one living plant that needs regular, specific attention: a substitute for the single host relationship this animal is actually built around. Tending it visibly changes the whole room.

    Reflection

    A single low-lit corner, no screens, where the day's held-back read on things finally gets said out loud, even just to the room.

    Elements to avoid

    • Fully glass-walled rooms with no shaded retreat
    • Overhead lighting with no dimmer or alternative
    • Open-plan bedrooms visible from a shared hallway
    • A calendar with no unscheduled, unaccountable hour in it
    The five-minute reset

    Five minutes: close one door, dim one light by half, and name out loud one thing you noticed today and didn't say.

    土 Feng Shui
    for the
    Glasswing Butterfly

    Free with a Zodi Animal account

    Redesign your space with feng shui

    A room-by-room guide tuned to your Earth element: arrange your home so it works with your nature instead of against it. Yours free when you make a Zodi Animal account.

    • Room by room, tuned to your Earth element
    • What to place, what to clear, and where
    • Free the moment you make an account
    Get the free eBook

    Feng shui elements here are symbolic. They support intention and act as visual reminders, not claims that any object, color, or direction produces wealth, health, romance, or success.

    Integration

    Practices for the Unseen Guardian

    Small, physical, repeatable. One from each room of your life.

    • The lesson

      Being seen through and being known are different achievements, and you have gotten very good at the first one. The growth here isn't becoming louder. It's choosing, on purpose and on a schedule you set, to let the real thing show through the glass sometimes instead of only when tested.

    • A ritual

      At the New Moon, say one true, specific thing out loud to the room you're in, even if the room is empty.

    • In your space

      Keep the one plant that needs tending where you'll see it daily. It is a physical reminder that some things get your real attention on purpose, not by accident.

    • In one bond

      Tell one person, this week, the thing you'd normally wait to be asked twice about.

    • At work

      Say your read on a decision before anyone asks for it, once, and notice whether the room actually punishes you for it or not.

    Moon rhythm

    Your power moon

    The New Moon is the sky at its most transparent: nothing lit, nothing performing, everything present and unlit at once. It matches this animal's actual resting state: fully there, giving nothing away. Use it to set one honest intention privately, out loud, before the world asks anything of you. Avoid using the dark as an excuse to disappear completely; the point is presence without performance, not absence.

    Your next new moon · Power Moon

    Tuesday, July 14, 2026

    3 days from today.

    When it arrives, dim one light, close one door, and say the thing you've been holding back to whoever's actually in the room, or to the room itself, if no one is.

    1. Monday, July 13Dim the lights early. Write down the one true thing you're not saying yet.
    2. Tuesday, July 14 · New MoonSay it out loud, once, to the room you're in, even if the room is empty.
    3. Wednesday, July 15Notice what changed in you now that it's been said. Let the rest of the month be ordinary.
    Explore the Moon hub

    The proverb of your year

    綿mián裡lǐ藏cáng針zhēn

    Tap a tile to hear one character

    Literally a needle hidden inside silk floss

    Meaning A softness that is not weakness. What looks entirely yielding may be carrying something sharp, kept back until it's actually needed.

    The wing that a bird looks past twice hides nothing on its surface, and somewhere underneath it, a needle waits anyway. You are the silk and the point both, and you have never needed to choose.

    A proverb we tie to the Year of the Goat. The pairing is our own reading, not tradition.

    In relationship

    How the Glasswing Butterfly loves

    You will let almost anyone stand close to you. Very few get to actually reach you, and you have never once explained the difference out loud.

    Care, for you, looks like showing up reliably and reading what a person needs before they ask. The pattern underneath is that offering care is easy, and receiving it back requires a trust you extend slowly, on your own timeline, to almost no one.

    How you show love

    Anticipate needs before they're spoken, and keep showing up long after the initial spark fades.

    What makes you feel safe

    A partner who notices the quiet signals and never demands the loud version instead.

    What they may misunderstand

    Your calm reads as unaffected, when it's actually a held-still response to feeling almost everything.

    Your conflict pattern

    Go quieter exactly when the conversation needs you loudest, then resurface the issue days later, fully formed.

    What to practice

    Say the true version the first time it comes up, at half its eventual size.

    How you show up

    The friend who remembers the specific detail and shows up with exactly the right thing, unasked.

    What they may misunderstand

    That you're fine, because you never make your own bad week anyone else's problem.

    What to practice

    Let one friend see you mid-problem, not just post-solution.

    How you show up

    The reliable one: the plans get made around your steadiness without anyone naming it.

    What they may misunderstand

    That steadiness costs nothing, when it's frequently the thing you're most tired from providing.

    What to practice

    Ask for something back, specifically and out loud, before you're depleted enough to resent it.

    How you show up

    Calm under pressure, generous with credit, slow to escalate anything that could be absorbed instead.

    Your conflict pattern

    Absorb friction privately until it becomes a pattern too large to raise casually, then raise it all at once.

    What to practice

    Flag the small friction the week it happens, at the size it actually is.

    Good support for you doesn't ask you to explain the guard before it's willing to sit near it. It shows up reliably, notices the quiet signal instead of waiting for the loud one, and lets you set the pace at which the glass actually clears.

    Test this bond with a second birth date

    Computed across all 143 other crossings

    Matches the wheel favors

    Strongest pull

    Match I · of three

    火

    Moose

    ♉ Taurus × 马 Horse

    1942, 1954, 1966, 1978, 1990, 2002, 2014

    Secret friendsTheir Fire feeds your Earth

    The Horse is the Goat's secret friend, the wheel's quiet allied pair. Their Fire feeds your Earth: this one is fuel.

    Read the Moose

    Match II · of three

    土

    Clark's Nutcracker

    ♍ Virgo × 羊 Goat

    1943, 1955, 1967, 1979, 1991, 2003, 2015

    Same yearShared Earth

    Two Goat years run on the same clock. Two Earth natures recognize each other on sight.

    Read the Clark's Nutcracker

    Match III · of three

    木

    Sea Otter

    ♋ Cancer × 兔 Rabbit

    1951, 1963, 1975, 1987, 1999, 2011, 2023

    Same trineWood nature

    The Rabbit shares the Goat's trine, so effort between you compounds.

    Read the Sea Otter

    See what's underneath

    Where to go from the Glasswing Butterfly

    Three matches surfaced above; the wheel holds 140 more. Each crossing opens onto others, and these are meanings to explore, not verdicts. Contrast is a mirror for self-knowledge, never a warning.

    Best next reading

    See how Cancer changes across the other eleven years

    Same Sun sign, eleven different year-animals: the fastest way to feel which parts of this reading are Cancer's, and which belong only to the Glasswing.

    All Cancer animals

    Animals your instincts trust on sight

    Wired the same way underneath: goes still, goes invisible, or goes armored first, and lets the deterrent do the rest of the work.

    Glass FrogPisces · Year of the Snake Slow LorisScorpio · Year of the Snake PangolinTaurus · Year of the Snake TarsierScorpio · Year of the Rat

    The temperaments that stretch yours

    Everything you handle by going quiet, these handle by getting louder: useful company for practicing the opposite muscle.

    Satin BowerbirdLibra · Year of the Rooster Honey BadgerAries · Year of the Pig WolverineAries · Year of the Tiger Devil's Flower MantisScorpio · Year of the Rooster

    Same year, other skies

    The Goat's steadiness reads differently under every sign it's paired with. Here is the same fixed Earth nature, worn by eleven other temperaments.

    WallcreeperAries · Year of the Goat Snow PetrelTaurus · Year of the Goat Rock WrenGemini · Year of the Goat Golden Brushtail PossumLeo · Year of the Goat
    Explore all of these crossings
    Clark's NutcrackerLuna MothSnow LeopardBar-headed GooseHercules BeetleKakapoGhost Pipefish

    Same sky, other years

    Cancer's watchfulness shows up in every one of these, each one carrying it in a different body and a different element.

    Coconut CrabCancer · Year of the Rat Asian ElephantCancer · Year of the Ox Moon BearCancer · Year of the Tiger Sea OtterCancer · Year of the Rabbit

    The last chapter

    The Glasswing Butterfly is yours.
    Now find out who actually gets past the glass.

    The Bond Test

    Bring a friend into the reading

    One birthdate is all it takes. Turn the wheel to their year, and their animal steps out to meet the Glasswing Butterfly.

    Your first friend

    01 The year they were born
    牛 1995 · Year of the Pig
    02 The month
    03 The day

    The Moon tonightCome back at your power phase, the New Moon, and set one thing straight before the month asks anything of you. Wander the MenagerieAll 144 crossings. Each one opens onto others.

    The Unseen Guardian · Cancer × Goat · Earth 土

    Your line to keep

    I am the Glasswing Butterfly: I read a room instantly, give without keeping score, and guard one door nobody else holds the key to.

    蝶

    Where you go next

    Three doors are open. Pick one.

    You know the shape of the Glasswing Butterfly now. Here is what the reading did not tell you yet, and where each thread runs.

    Bonds

    Test a friend against your wheel

    Drop any name onto the Glasswing Butterfly wheel and see where they sit. Ally, mirror, or friction.

    Fire warms this nature into generosity; Wood keeps its softness from spreading past its own good sense.

    Run the Bond Test     Purple Star 紫微

    Your chart is bigger than one animal

    Purple Star astrology, Zi Wei Dou Shu, maps your whole birth chart: fourteen stars across twelve palaces, cast from your exact birth hour.

    The reading here is the outline your Cancer Goat shares. Your own chart shows which palace runs loudest.

    Cast your chart

    Save your Glasswing Butterfly before you go.

    A free account keeps this reading and every animal you test, on any device. Come back to where you left off instead of a blank page.

    About a minute to set up. No card. Delete it anytime.

    Sends it to a friend.

    Glasswing Butterfly · 044 / 144 · Earth 土

    Pass it on

    Share your crossing

    Keep every reading you are given.

    Make it permanent

    This device will remember the Glasswing Butterfly until it doesn't. A free account keeps your animal, your reflections, and every reading you are given, renewed with each new moon, on any device.

    • Your Glasswing Butterfly, saved for good
    • Your identity line and keeper stone, kept
    • The feng shui eBook for your element, free
    Create your free account

    The Glasswing Butterfly Test

    Do you stay soft on purpose, the way the Glasswing Butterfly does?

    The Glasswing Butterfly is built from five traits. Ten quick questions measure yours against its shape and tell you whether you are a true Glasswing Butterfly, or a rare one who carries them differently.

    5 traits 10 questions ≈ 2 minutes No account needed

      Glasswing Butterfly You

      How this reading is built

      Each Zodi Animal reading combines four threads: Western zodiac symbolism (your Sun sign), Chinese zodiac symbolism (your year animal), five-element interpretation (Wu Xing, via the year-animal's fixed element), and the real biology and behavior of the animal itself. The archetype that binds them, here the Unseen Guardian, is Zodi Animal's own framework. Readings are for reflection and self-exploration; they are not clinical assessment, scientific personality testing, or a claim about fate. Animal facts are drawn from zoological references and flagged in the text as Animal fact; interpretive material is flagged as Our reading.

      • Siddique, Gomard & Hölscher · Random nanostructures and omnidirectional anti-reflection in the glasswing butterfly, Nature Communications 6:6909 (2015)
      • Arias et al. · Transparency reduces predator detection in mimetic clearwing butterflies, Functional Ecology 33(6) (2019)
      • Dyer · Tasty generalists and nasty specialists: antipredator mechanisms in tropical lepidopteran larvae, Ecology 76(5) (1995)
      • Schulz et al. · Semiochemicals derived from pyrrolizidine alkaloids in male ithomiine butterflies, Biochemical Systematics and Ecology 32(8) (2004)
      • Ingram & Parker · Structure, mechanism and mechanical properties of pupal attachment in Greta oto, Entomological Science 9(1) (2006)

      Last reviewed 2026-07-09

      Your Readingabout 6 min Meet the AnimalThe CrossingYour ElementThe Primal MirrorThe Awakened Animal Your Lifeabout 5 min Working NatureIdeal HabitatGrowth Go Deeperbrowse Moon RhythmYour Proverb Your Peopleplay RelationshipsRelated AnimalsThe Bond Test

      Zodi Animal

      One hundred and forty-four animals, born where the Western Sun signs cross the Chinese zodiac years. A slow tradition of meaning, kept under the moon.

      The Daily Reading

      Your reading, at dawn.

      One short passage for your Zodi Animal each morning. The moon's phase, what it favors, and a line meant for you. Free, and it takes ten seconds to join.
